subcodes.first_line: O true friends! His honor the Trusted One ever praises those souls who accompany His Excellency Arbab Jamshid [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران جانی جناب امین همواره ستایش از نفوسیکه در معیت حضرت ارباب جمشیدند
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @attaining good pleasure of God
